name: Food Calorie Scanner
format:
<!--
  Food Scanner — premium HealthTech SaaS dashboard (single Node-RED ui_template).
  Type: Outfit (display) + Manrope (body). Icons: Phosphor Duotone (icon font).
  Design system (CSS vars) + KPI cards, premium scan card, detected-food card,
  timeline meal log w/ delete, proportional charts + empty states, responsive.
  In-browser TensorFlow.js inference. History in localStorage.
  All assets served locally & absolutely under /food-model/.
-->
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@500;600;700;800&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/food-model/ph-duotone.css">

<style>
/* ============================================================= DESIGN SYSTEM */
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-template,
.nr-dashboard-theme md-card.nr-dashboard-template{
  background:transparent!important;box-shadow:none!important;padding:0!important;margin:0!important;border:0!important;}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-content.md-default-theme{ background:transparent!important; overflow-x:hidden!important; }
html,body{ overflow-x:hidden!important; }
/* Make this single widget span the full dashboard width and fit its content
   height (Node-RED otherwise offsets it left & gives it a huge fixed height). */
ui-card-panel[node-id="food_group"]{ left:0!important; top:0!important; width:100%!important; height:auto!important; }
ui-card-panel[node-id="food_group"] .nr-dashboard-cardcontainer{ width:100%!important; height:auto!important; }
md-card[node-id="food_template"]{ left:0!important; top:0!important; width:100%!important; height:auto!important; }

#fs{
  --bg:#f6f7fb; --surface:#ffffff; --surface-2:#fbfcfe;
  --ink-900:#10151f; --ink-700:#39414f; --ink-500:#6b7382; --ink-400:#9aa1af; --line:#eceff4;
  --brand:#ff6a3d; --brand-600:#ec5526; --brand-50:#fff0ea;
  --protein:#7c5cff; --protein-50:#f0ecff;
  --fat:#f59e0b; --fat-50:#fef3e0;
  --carbs:#16b87a; --carbs-50:#e4f7f0;
  --cal:#ff4d5e; --cal-50:#ffeced;
  --r-sm:10px; --r-md:14px; --r-lg:20px; --r-xl:26px;
  --sh-sm:0 1px 2px rgba(16,21,31,.05);
  --sh-md:0 2px 6px rgba(16,21,31,.05),0 12px 28px rgba(16,21,31,.06);
  --sh-lg:0 8px 40px rgba(16,21,31,.10);
  --font:'Manrope',-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,sans-serif;
  --display:'Outfit',var(--font);
  font-family:var(--font); color:var(--ink-900); box-sizing:border-box; width:100%; min-height:100vh; overflow-x:hidden;
  background:radial-gradient(1200px 480px at 88% -8%,#fff1ea 0,rgba(255,241,234,0) 60%),
             radial-gradient(900px 420px at -6% 6%,#eef0ff 0,rgba(238,240,255,0) 55%), var(--bg);
}
#fs *,#fs *::before,#fs *::after{ box-sizing:border-box; }
#fs .wrap{ max-width:none; margin:0 auto; padding:16px clamp(16px,2.6vw,40px) 28px; }
#fs h2,#fs h3{ font-family:var(--display); }
#fs .ph-duotone{ display:inline-block; vertical-align:middle; }

/* card primitive */
#fs .card{ background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:var(--r-lg); box-shadow:var(--sh-md); }
#fs .card__h{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:18px 20px 0; }
#fs .card__h .ttl{ font-family:var(--display); font-size:15px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-.01em; }
#fs .card__h .ic{ width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:9px; display:grid; place-items:center; background:var(--brand-50); color:var(--brand); flex:none; }
#fs .card__h .ic i{ font-size:18px; }
#fs .card__h .act{ margin-left:auto; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
#fs .card__b{ padding:16px 20px 20px; }

/* ===================================================================== HEADER */
#fs .hdr{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:13px; margin-bottom:14px; }
#fs .avatar{ width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:14px; flex:none; display:grid; place-items:center; color:#fff;
  font-family:var(--display); font-weight:800; font-size:18px; background:linear-gradient(140deg,var(--brand),#ff9a6b);
  box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(255,106,61,.4); }
#fs .hdr .greet{ font-size:12.5px; color:var(--ink-500); font-weight:500; }
#fs .hdr .h1{ font-family:var(--display); font-size:21px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:-.02em; line-height:1.1; }
#fs .hdr .right{ margin-left:auto; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; }
#fs .chiprow{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:7px; font-size:12.5px; font-weight:600; color:var(--ink-700);
  background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); padding:9px 13px; border-radius:12px; box-shadow:var(--sh-sm); }
#fs .chiprow i{ font-size:16px; color:var(--brand); }
#fs .iconbtn{ width:42px; height:42px; border-radius:12px; background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line);
  display:grid; place-items:center; color:var(--ink-700); box-shadow:var(--sh-sm); cursor:pointer; transition:.15s; position:relative; }
#fs .iconbtn:hover{ box-shadow:var(--sh-md); transform:translateY(-1px); }
#fs .iconbtn i{ font-size:21px; }
#fs .iconbtn .dot{ position:absolute; top:9px; right:10px; width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--cal); border:2px solid #fff; z-index:1; }

/* ============================================================= KPI / DAILY GOALS */
#fs .sect-h{ display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:10px; margin:0 4px 9px; }
#fs .sect-h .t{ font-family:var(--display); font-size:13.5px; font-weight:700; }
#fs .sect-h .s{ font-size:12px; color:var(--ink-500); }
#fs .kpis{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:12px; }
#fs .kpi{ background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:var(--r-md); padding:13px 14px; box-shadow:var(--sh-sm); transition:.18s; }
#fs .kpi:hover{ box-shadow:var(--sh-md); transform:translateY(-2px); }
#fs .kpi__top{ display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; }
#fs .kpi__ic{ width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:10px; display:grid; place-items:center; }
#fs .kpi__ic i{ font-size:19px; }
#fs .kpi__pct{ font-size:11.5px; font-weight:700; padding:3px 9px; border-radius:999px; }
#fs .kpi__num{ font-family:var(--display); font-size:24px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:-.03em; margin-top:9px; line-height:1; }
#fs .kpi__goal{ font-family:var(--font); font-size:12.5px; font-weight:600; color:var(--ink-400); margin-left:4px; }
#fs .kpi__lab{ font-size:12px; color:var(--ink-500); margin-top:2px; font-weight:500; }
#fs .kpi__bar{ height:6px; border-radius:99px; background:var(--line); margin-top:10px; overflow:hidden; }
#fs .kpi__bar i{ display:block; height:100%; border-radius:99px; width:0; transition:width .5s cubic-bezier(.3,1,.4,1); }
#fs .kpi--cal .kpi__ic{ background:var(--cal-50); color:var(--cal); } #fs .kpi--cal .kpi__pct{ background:var(--cal-50); color:var(--cal); } #fs .kpi--cal .kpi__bar i{ background:var(--cal); }
#fs .kpi--pro .kpi__ic{ background:var(--protein-50); color:var(--protein); } #fs .kpi--pro .kpi__pct{ background:var(--protein-50); color:var(--protein); } #fs .kpi--pro .kpi__bar i{ background:var(--protein); }
#fs .kpi--fat .kpi__ic{ background:var(--fat-50); color:var(--fat); } #fs .kpi--fat .kpi__pct{ background:var(--fat-50); color:var(--fat); } #fs .kpi--fat .kpi__bar i{ background:var(--fat); }
#fs .kpi--carb .kpi__ic{ background:var(--carbs-50); color:var(--carbs); } #fs .kpi--carb .kpi__pct{ background:var(--carbs-50); color:var(--carbs); } #fs .kpi--carb .kpi__bar i{ background:var(--carbs); }

/* ===================================================================== LAYOUT */
#fs .card__h{ padding:14px 16px 0; }
#fs .card__b{ padding:13px 16px 16px; }
#fs .main{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.08fr 1fr .92fr; gap:12px; margin-top:12px; align-items:stretch; }
#fs .main > .card{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; height:100%; }
#fs .main > .card > .card__b{ flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
#fs .card--result{ min-height:548px; }            /* fixed room so matches always show */
#fs .rail{ display:grid; gap:12px; grid-auto-rows:1fr; }   /* two rail cards equal & fill height */
#fs .rail > .card{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
#fs .rail .card__b{ flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
#fs .rail .chart-wrap{ flex:1; height:auto; min-height:120px; }
#fs .rail .chart-empty{ flex:1; height:auto; }
#fs .mt{ margin-top:12px; }
@media(max-width:1120px){ #fs .main{ grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; } #fs .rail{ grid-column:1/-1; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; } }
@media(max-width:1000px){ #fs .kpis{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); } }
@media(max-width:760px){ #fs .main{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } #fs .rail{ grid-column:auto; grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
@media(max-width:520px){ #fs .kpis{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } }

/* ===================================================================== SCANNER */
#fs .stage{ position:relative; width:100%; min-height:200px; border-radius:var(--r-md); overflow:hidden; background:#0d1320; display:grid; place-items:center; }
/* show the full photo: frame adapts to the image's aspect ratio (no cropping) */
#fs video,#fs canvas{ width:100%; height:auto; max-height:380px; object-fit:contain; display:none; }
#fs .stage-ph{ color:#69728a; text-align:center; font-size:13px; padding:24px; }
#fs .stage-ph i{ font-size:48px; opacity:.6; display:block; margin:0 auto 12px; }
#fs .ovl{ position:absolute; inset:0; background:rgba(8,12,22,.66); backdrop-filter:blur(2px); display:none; place-items:center; z-index:4; }
#fs .ovl.on{ display:grid; }
#fs .ovl .sp{ width:48px; height:48px; border:4px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22); border-top-color:#fff; border-radius:50%; animation:spin .7s linear infinite; margin:0 auto 13px; }
#fs .ovl .t{ color:#fff; font-size:13.5px; font-weight:600; text-align:center; }
@keyframes spin{ to{ transform:rotate(360deg); } }
#fs .btnrow{ display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:14px; }
#fs .btn{ border:0; border-radius:13px; padding:13px 14px; font:600 14px var(--font); cursor:pointer; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; transition:.15s; }
#fs .btn i{ font-size:19px; }
#fs .btn--primary{ flex:1.3; background:var(--brand); color:#fff; box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(255,106,61,.32); }
#fs .btn--primary:hover{ background:var(--brand-600); transform:translateY(-1px); }
#fs .btn--ghost{ flex:1; background:var(--surface-2); color:var(--ink-700); border:1px solid var(--line); }
#fs .btn--ghost:hover{ background:#f1f3f8; }
#fs .btn:disabled{ opacity:.5; cursor:not-allowed; box-shadow:none; transform:none; }
#fs .alert{ margin-top:13px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:9px; font-size:12.5px; font-weight:500; color:var(--ink-500);
  background:var(--surface-2); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:11px; padding:10px 12px; min-height:40px; }
#fs .alert .mini{ width:15px; height:15px; border:2px solid var(--brand-50); border-top-color:var(--brand); border-radius:50%; animation:spin .7s linear infinite; flex:none; }
#fs .alert.ok{ color:var(--carbs); background:var(--carbs-50); border-color:transparent; }
#fs .alert.err{ color:var(--cal); background:var(--cal-50); border-color:transparent; }

/* ====================================================== SKELETON (loading) */
#fs .sk{ background:linear-gradient(90deg,#edf0f4 25%,#f7f9fb 37%,#edf0f4 63%); background-size:400% 100%;
  animation:shimmer 1.5s ease infinite; border-radius:10px; }
@keyframes shimmer{ 0%{ background-position:100% 0; } 100%{ background-position:0 0; } }
#fs .skel .res__hero{ align-items:flex-start; }
#fs .sk-cal{ width:118px; height:96px; border-radius:14px; flex:none; }
#fs .sk-info{ flex:1; }
#fs .sk-line{ height:11px; margin-bottom:11px; }
#fs .sk-title{ height:24px; width:66%; margin-bottom:11px; }
#fs .sk-badge{ height:22px; width:44%; border-radius:999px; }
#fs .sk-macro{ height:80px; border-radius:14px; }
#fs .sk-row{ height:34px; margin-bottom:9px; }
#fs .skel-cap{ text-align:center; color:var(--ink-400); font-size:12.5px; margin-top:16px; }

/* ============================================================== DETECTED FOOD */
#fs .empty{ text-align:center; color:var(--ink-500); padding:34px 16px; font-size:13px; }
#fs .empty i{ font-size:46px; opacity:.45; color:var(--ink-400); display:block; margin:0 auto 12px; }
#fs .res__hero{ display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:center; }
#fs .res__cal{ flex:none; width:118px; padding:16px 10px; border-radius:var(--r-md); text-align:center;
  background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--cal-50),#fff6f6); border:1px solid #ffe0e3; }
#fs .res__cal .v{ font-family:var(--display); font-size:30px; font-weight:800; color:var(--cal); letter-spacing:-.03em; line-height:1; }
#fs .res__cal .u{ font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-500); font-weight:600; margin-top:3px; }
#fs .res__cal .k{ font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-400); margin-top:8px; }
#fs .res__info{ min-width:0; }
#fs .res__match{ font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:var(--ink-400); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; }
#fs .res__name{ font-family:var(--display); font-size:24px; font-weight:800; text-transform:capitalize; letter-spacing:-.02em; line-height:1.1; margin:2px 0 4px; }
#fs .res__serv{ font-size:12.5px; color:var(--ink-500); }
#fs .badge{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; margin-top:9px; font-size:11.5px; font-weight:700; padding:5px 11px; border-radius:999px; }
#fs .badge i{ font-size:15px; }
#fs .badge--low{ background:var(--cal-50); color:var(--cal); } #fs .badge--med{ background:var(--fat-50); color:var(--fat); } #fs .badge--high{ background:var(--carbs-50); color:var(--carbs); }
#fs .macros{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:11px; margin-top:18px; }
#fs .macro{ border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:var(--r-md); padding:13px 10px; text-align:center; background:var(--surface-2); }
#fs .macro__ic{ width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:10px; display:grid; place-items:center; margin:0 auto 9px; }
#fs .macro__ic i{ font-size:18px; }
#fs .macro__v{ font-family:var(--display); font-size:18px; font-weight:800; } #fs .macro__l{ font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-500); margin-top:1px; }
#fs .macro--pro .macro__ic{ background:var(--protein-50); color:var(--protein); }
#fs .macro--fat .macro__ic{ background:var(--fat-50); color:var(--fat); }
#fs .macro--carb .macro__ic{ background:var(--carbs-50); color:var(--carbs); }
#fs .alts{ margin-top:18px; }
#fs .alts h4{ font-family:var(--display); font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--ink-500); margin:0 0 8px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.05em; }
#fs .alt{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; padding:9px 0; border-top:1px solid var(--line); }
#fs .alt__rank{ width:22px; height:22px; border-radius:7px; background:var(--surface-2); border:1px solid var(--line); display:grid; place-items:center; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:var(--ink-500); flex:none; }
#fs .alt__nm{ font-size:13px; font-weight:600; text-transform:capitalize; }
#fs .alt__r{ margin-left:auto; text-align:right; }
#fs .alt__pct{ font-size:13px; font-weight:700; } #fs .alt__kc{ font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-500); }

/* ===================================================================== CHARTS */
#fs .chart-wrap{ position:relative; height:128px; }
#fs .chart-empty{ display:none; height:128px; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-direction:column; color:var(--ink-400); text-align:center; font-size:12.5px; }
#fs .chart-empty i{ font-size:40px; opacity:.45; margin-bottom:8px; }
#fs .chart-empty.on{ display:flex; } #fs .chart-wrap.off{ display:none; }

/* =================================================================== MEAL LOG */
#fs #log{ max-height:232px; overflow-y:auto; }
#fs #log::-webkit-scrollbar{ width:7px; } #fs #log::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{ background:#dfe3ea; border-radius:99px; }
#fs .meal{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; padding:11px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); transition:.12s; }
#fs .meal:last-child{ border-bottom:0; }
#fs .meal:hover{ background:var(--surface-2); margin:0 -10px; padding:13px 10px; border-radius:12px; border-bottom-color:transparent; }
#fs .meal__th{ width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:13px; background:var(--brand-50); color:var(--brand); display:grid; place-items:center; flex:none; }
#fs .meal__th i{ font-size:23px; }
#fs .meal__nm{ font-weight:700; font-size:14px; text-transform:capitalize; } #fs .meal__tm{ font-size:11.5px; color:var(--ink-500); margin-top:1px; }
#fs .meal__chips{ margin-left:auto; display:flex; gap:13px; }
#fs .mchip{ font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-500); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; white-space:nowrap; }
#fs .mchip i{ width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; display:inline-block; }
#fs .meal__kc{ font-family:var(--display); font-weight:800; font-size:14px; min-width:72px; text-align:right; }
#fs .meal__del{ width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:9px; border:1px solid var(--line); background:var(--surface); color:var(--ink-400); cursor:pointer; display:grid; place-items:center; flex:none; transition:.12s; }
#fs .meal__del:hover{ color:var(--cal); border-color:var(--cal-50); background:var(--cal-50); }
#fs .meal__del i{ font-size:16px; }
#fs .btn--danger{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; font-size:12.5px; font-weight:600; color:var(--ink-500); background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); padding:7px 12px; border-radius:10px; cursor:pointer; }
#fs .btn--danger i{ font-size:15px; }
#fs .btn--danger:hover{ color:var(--cal); border-color:var(--cal-50); background:var(--cal-50); }
@media(max-width:640px){ #fs .meal__chips{ display:none; } #fs .res__hero{ flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; } #fs .res__cal{ width:100%; } }

/* =================================================================== PROFILE MODAL */
#fs .avatar-btn{ border:0; cursor:pointer; font-family:var(--display); transition:.15s; }
#fs .avatar-btn:hover{ transform:translateY(-1px); filter:brightness(1.05); }
#fs .modal{ position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(16,21,31,.45); backdrop-filter:blur(3px); display:none; place-items:center; z-index:70; }
#fs .modal.on{ display:grid; }
#fs .modal__card{ width:min(460px,92vw); background:var(--surface); border-radius:var(--r-lg); box-shadow:var(--sh-lg); padding:22px; }
#fs .modal__h{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; margin-bottom:3px; }
#fs .modal__h .ic{ width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:10px; background:var(--brand-50); color:var(--brand); display:grid; place-items:center; }
#fs .modal__h .ic i{ font-size:19px; }
#fs .modal__h .ttl{ font-family:var(--display); font-weight:800; font-size:17px; }
#fs .modal__sub{ font-size:12.5px; color:var(--ink-500); margin-bottom:16px; }
#fs .frm{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px; }
#fs .fld{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; }
#fs .fld.full{ grid-column:1/-1; }
#fs .fld label{ font-size:11.5px; font-weight:600; color:var(--ink-500); }
#fs .fld input,#fs .fld select{ font:500 14px var(--font); color:var(--ink-900); background:var(--surface-2); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:10px; padding:10px 12px; outline:none; transition:.15s; }
#fs .fld input:focus,#fs .fld select:focus{ border-color:var(--brand); background:#fff; }
#fs .bmi{ grid-column:1/-1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; background:var(--surface-2); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:12px; padding:12px 14px; margin-top:2px; }
#fs .bmi .lab{ font-size:11.5px; color:var(--ink-500); font-weight:600; }
#fs .bmi .v{ font-family:var(--display); font-weight:800; font-size:21px; }
#fs .bmi .cat{ font-size:12px; font-weight:700; padding:4px 11px; border-radius:999px; }
#fs .modal__foot{ display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:18px; }
#fs .modal__foot .btn{ flex:1; }

/* =================================================================== TOAST */
#fs .toast{ position:fixed; left:50%; top:20px; transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-150%); z-index:60;
  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:9px; background:#10151f; color:#fff; padding:12px 18px; border-radius:13px;
  font-size:13px; font-weight:600; box-shadow:var(--sh-lg); transition:transform .32s cubic-bezier(.3,1.2,.5,1); max-width:90%; }
#fs .toast.show{ transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
#fs .toast.err{ background:#3a1115; color:#ffd7da; } #fs .toast i{ font-size:18px; flex:none; }
</style>

<div id="fs">
 <div id="toast" class="toast"></div>
 <div class="wrap">

  <!-- HEADER -->
  <header class="hdr">
    <div class="avatar" id="avatar">F</div>
    <div>
      <div class="greet" id="greet">Welcome back</div>
      <div class="h1">Food Scanner</div>
    </div>
    <div class="right">
      <div class="chiprow"><i class="ph-duotone ph-calendar-dots"></i><span id="hdrDate">Today</span></div>
      <button class="iconbtn" title="Notifications"><span class="dot"></span><i class="ph-duotone ph-bell"></i></button>
      <button class="avatar avatar-btn" id="profileBtn" title="Edit profile & goals" style="width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:12px;font-size:15px;background:linear-gradient(140deg,#7c5cff,#9f8bff);box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(124,92,255,.35)">B</button>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- DAILY OVERVIEW -->
  <div class="sect-h"><span class="t">Daily nutrition</span><span class="s" id="goalSub">Tracking against your daily goal</span></div>
  <div class="kpis">
    <div class="kpi kpi--cal">
      <div class="kpi__top"><div class="kpi__ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-fire"></i></div><span class="kpi__pct" id="pKcal">0%</span></div>
      <div class="kpi__num"><span id="vKcal">0</span><span class="kpi__goal" id="gKcal">/ 2000</span></div>
      <div class="kpi__lab">Calories · kcal</div>
      <div class="kpi__bar"><i id="bKcal"></i></div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi kpi--pro">
      <div class="kpi__top"><div class="kpi__ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-barbell"></i></div><span class="kpi__pct" id="pPro">0%</span></div>
      <div class="kpi__num"><span id="vPro">0</span><span class="kpi__goal" id="gPro">/ 120g</span></div>
      <div class="kpi__lab">Protein · grams</div>
      <div class="kpi__bar"><i id="bPro"></i></div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi kpi--fat">
      <div class="kpi__top"><div class="kpi__ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-drop"></i></div><span class="kpi__pct" id="pFat">0%</span></div>
      <div class="kpi__num"><span id="vFat">0</span><span class="kpi__goal" id="gFat">/ 70g</span></div>
      <div class="kpi__lab">Fat · grams</div>
      <div class="kpi__bar"><i id="bFat"></i></div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi kpi--carb">
      <div class="kpi__top"><div class="kpi__ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-bread"></i></div><span class="kpi__pct" id="pCarb">0%</span></div>
      <div class="kpi__num"><span id="vCarb">0</span><span class="kpi__goal" id="gCarb">/ 250g</span></div>
      <div class="kpi__lab">Net carbs · grams</div>
      <div class="kpi__bar"><i id="bCarb"></i></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- MAIN: scanner · result · charts rail -->
  <div class="main">
    <section class="card">
      <div class="card__h"><span class="ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-camera"></i></span><span class="ttl">Scan your meal</span></div>
      <div class="card__b">
        <div class="stage">
          <video id="vid" autoplay playsinline muted></video>
          <canvas id="cv"></canvas>
          <div class="stage-ph" id="ph"><i class="ph-duotone ph-image"></i>Start the camera or upload a photo of your meal</div>
          <div class="ovl" id="ovl"><div><div class="sp"></div><div class="t" id="ovlT">Analyzing your meal…</div></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="btnrow">
          <button class="btn btn--ghost" id="bCam"><i class="ph-duotone ph-camera"></i>Camera</button>
          <button class="btn btn--ghost" id="bUp"><i class="ph-duotone ph-upload-simple"></i>Upload<input id="file" type="file" accept="image/*" style="display:none"></button>
          <button class="btn btn--primary" id="bScan" disabled><i class="ph-duotone ph-scan"></i>Scan food</button>
        </div>
        <div class="alert" id="alert"><span class="mini"></span><span id="alertT">Loading AI model…</span></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="card card--result">
      <div class="card__h"><span class="ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-sparkle"></i></span><span class="ttl">Detected food</span></div>
      <div class="card__b">
        <div id="resEmpty" class="skel">
          <div class="res__hero">
            <div class="sk sk-cal"></div>
            <div class="sk-info">
              <div class="sk sk-line" style="width:38%"></div>
              <div class="sk sk-title"></div>
              <div class="sk sk-badge"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="macros">
            <div class="sk sk-macro"></div><div class="sk sk-macro"></div><div class="sk sk-macro"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="alts">
            <div class="sk sk-line" style="width:42%;margin-bottom:13px"></div>
            <div class="sk sk-row"></div><div class="sk sk-row"></div><div class="sk sk-row"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="skel-cap"><i class="ph-duotone ph-scan"></i> Scan a meal to see its nutrition breakdown</div>
        </div>
        <div id="resBox" style="display:none">
          <div class="res__hero">
            <div class="res__cal"><div class="v" id="rKcalV">0</div><div class="u">kcal</div><div class="k" id="rServ">per serving</div></div>
            <div class="res__info">
              <div class="res__match">Best match</div>
              <div class="res__name" id="rFood">—</div>
              <span class="badge" id="rBadge"></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="macros">
            <div class="macro macro--pro"><div class="macro__ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-barbell"></i></div><div class="macro__v" id="mPro">0g</div><div class="macro__l">Protein</div></div>
            <div class="macro macro--fat"><div class="macro__ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-drop"></i></div><div class="macro__v" id="mFat">0g</div><div class="macro__l">Fat</div></div>
            <div class="macro macro--carb"><div class="macro__ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-bread"></i></div><div class="macro__v" id="mCarb">0g</div><div class="macro__l">Net carbs</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="alts"><h4>Other possible matches</h4><div id="alts"></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- charts rail -->
    <div class="rail">
      <section class="card">
        <div class="card__h"><span class="ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-chart-bar"></i></span><span class="ttl">Calories — 7 days</span></div>
        <div class="card__b">
          <div class="chart-wrap" id="calWrap"><canvas id="chCal"></canvas></div>
          <div class="chart-empty" id="calEmpty"><i class="ph-duotone ph-chart-bar"></i>No calories logged this week yet.</div>
        </div>
      </section>
      <section class="card">
        <div class="card__h"><span class="ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-chart-pie-slice"></i></span><span class="ttl">Top foods</span></div>
        <div class="card__b">
          <div class="chart-wrap" id="foodWrap"><canvas id="chFood"></canvas></div>
          <div class="chart-empty" id="foodEmpty"><i class="ph-duotone ph-chart-pie-slice"></i>Scan a few meals to see your top foods.</div>
        </div>
      </section>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- MEAL LOG -->
  <section class="card mt">
    <div class="card__h"><span class="ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-clock-counter-clockwise"></i></span><span class="ttl">Meal log</span><span class="act"><button class="btn--danger" id="bClear"><i class="ph-duotone ph-trash"></i>Clear all</button></span></div>
    <div class="card__b" id="log"><div class="empty">No meals logged yet — scan your first meal above.</div></div>
  </section>

  <!-- PROFILE & GOALS MODAL -->
  <div class="modal" id="modal">
    <div class="modal__card">
      <div class="modal__h"><span class="ic"><i class="ph-duotone ph-user"></i></span><span class="ttl">Your profile & goals</span></div>
      <div class="modal__sub">We use this to personalize your daily calorie & macro targets.</div>
      <div class="frm">
        <div class="fld"><label>Height (cm)</label><input id="inH" type="number" min="100" max="230"></div>
        <div class="fld"><label>Weight (kg)</label><input id="inW" type="number" min="30" max="250"></div>
        <div class="fld"><label>Age</label><input id="inA" type="number" min="10" max="100"></div>
        <div class="fld"><label>Sex</label><select id="inS"><option value="male">Male</option><option value="female">Female</option></select></div>
        <div class="fld full"><label>Activity level</label><select id="inAct">
          <option value="1.2">Sedentary (little exercise)</option>
          <option value="1.375">Light (1–3 days/week)</option>
          <option value="1.55">Moderate (3–5 days/week)</option>
          <option value="1.725">Active (6–7 days/week)</option>
          <option value="1.9">Very active (athlete)</option>
        </select></div>
        <div class="fld full"><label>Goal</label><select id="inGoal">
          <option value="lose">Lose weight (−500 kcal)</option>
          <option value="maintain">Maintain weight</option>
          <option value="gain">Gain muscle (+400 kcal)</option>
        </select></div>
        <div class="bmi"><div><div class="lab">Body mass index</div><div class="v" id="bmiV">—</div></div><span class="cat" id="bmiCat">—</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal__foot">
        <button class="btn btn--ghost" id="mCancel">Cancel</button>
        <button class="btn btn--primary" id="mSave"><i class="ph-duotone ph-check"></i>Save goals</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

 </div>
</div>

<script src="/food-model/tf.min.js"></script>
<script src="/food-model/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
<script>
(function(){
  var IMG=224, MODEL="/food-model/model.json", KEY="fc_hist", PKEY="fc_profile";
  var DEF_PROFILE={height:170,weight:70,age:30,sex:"male",activity:1.55,goal:"maintain"};
  function loadProfile(){ try{ return Object.assign({},DEF_PROFILE,JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(PKEY))||{}); }catch(e){ return Object.assign({},DEF_PROFILE); } }
  function saveProfile(p){ try{ localStorage.setItem(PKEY,JSON.stringify(p)); }catch(e){} }
  // Mifflin-St Jeor BMR -> TDEE -> goal-adjusted targets
  function computeGoals(p){
    var bmr=10*p.weight+6.25*p.height-5*p.age+(p.sex==="male"?5:-161);
    var tdee=bmr*(+p.activity||1.55);
    var adj=p.goal==="lose"?-500:p.goal==="gain"?400:0;
    var kcal=Math.max(1200,Math.round((tdee+adj)/10)*10);
    var protein=Math.round(p.weight*1.8);
    var fat=Math.round(kcal*0.25/9);
    var carbs=Math.max(0,Math.round((kcal-protein*4-fat*9)/4));
    return {kcal:kcal,protein:protein,fat:fat,carbs:carbs};
  }
  function bmiInfo(p){
    var b=p.weight/Math.pow((p.height||170)/100,2);
    var cat=b<18.5?"Underweight":b<25?"Normal":b<30?"Overweight":"Obese";
    var col=b<18.5?"#0ea5e9":b<25?"#16b87a":b<30?"#f59e0b":"#ff4d5e";
    return {bmi:b.toFixed(1),cat:cat,col:col};
  }
  var GOAL=computeGoals(loadProfile());
  var model=null, labels=[], cals={}, calChart=null, foodChart=null;
  var $=function(id){return document.getElementById(id);};
  function alertMsg(t,kind){ $("alertT").textContent=t; var a=$("alert"); a.className="alert"+(kind?(" "+kind):"");
    var m=a.querySelector(".mini"); if(m) m.style.display=(kind==null?"inline-block":"none"); }
  function toast(m,err){ var t=$("toast"); t.innerHTML='<i class="ph-duotone ph-'+(err?"warning-circle":"check-circle")+'"></i>'+m; t.className="toast show"+(err?" err":"");
    setTimeout(function(){t.className="toast"+(err?" err":"");},4200); }
  function overlay(on,txt){ $("ovl").classList.toggle("on",on); if(txt)$("ovlT").textContent=txt; }

  (function(){ var h=new Date().getHours(); $("greet").textContent=(h<12?"Good morning":h<18?"Good afternoon":"Good evening")+" 👋"; })();

  /* ---------------- storage + analytics ---------------- */
  function load(){ try{ return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(KEY))||[]; }catch(e){ return []; } }
  function save(a){ try{ localStorage.setItem(KEY,JSON.stringify(a.slice(-200))); }catch(e){} }
  function dkey(ts){ var d=new Date(ts); return d.getFullYear()+"-"+(d.getMonth()+1)+"-"+d.getDate(); }
  function setKpi(prefix,val,goal){ var pct=goal?Math.round(val/goal*100):0;
    $("v"+prefix).textContent=val; $("p"+prefix).textContent=pct+"%"; $("b"+prefix).style.width=Math.min(100,pct)+"%"; }

  function render(){
    var h=load(), today=dkey(Date.now()), t=h.filter(function(e){return dkey(e.ts)===today;});
    var sum=function(k){return t.reduce(function(s,e){return s+(+e[k]||0);},0);};
    setKpi("Kcal",sum("kcal"),GOAL.kcal); setKpi("Pro",sum("protein"),GOAL.protein);
    setKpi("Fat",sum("fat"),GOAL.fat); setKpi("Carb",sum("carbs"),GOAL.carbs);
    $("hdrDate").textContent=new Date().toLocaleDateString(undefined,{weekday:"short",month:"short",day:"numeric"});
    $("gKcal").textContent="/ "+GOAL.kcal; $("gPro").textContent="/ "+GOAL.protein+"g";
    $("gFat").textContent="/ "+GOAL.fat+"g"; $("gCarb").textContent="/ "+GOAL.carbs+"g";
    var bi=bmiInfo(loadProfile());
    $("goalSub").textContent=sum("kcal")+" / "+GOAL.kcal+" kcal · "+Math.round(sum("kcal")/GOAL.kcal*100)+"% of goal · BMI "+bi.bmi+" ("+bi.cat+")";

    var log=$("log");
    if(!h.length){ log.innerHTML='<div class="empty">No meals logged yet — scan your first meal above.</div>'; }
    else{
      log.innerHTML=h.slice().reverse().slice(0,12).map(function(e){
        var tm=new Date(e.ts), hh=tm.getHours().toString().padStart(2,"0")+":"+tm.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2,"0");
        return '<div class="meal"><div class="meal__th"><i class="ph-duotone ph-fork-knife"></i></div>'+
          '<div><div class="meal__nm">'+e.label+'</div><div class="meal__tm">'+hh+'</div></div>'+
          '<div class="meal__chips"><span class="mchip"><i style="background:var(--protein)"></i>'+e.protein+'g</span><span class="mchip"><i style="background:var(--fat)"></i>'+e.fat+'g</span><span class="mchip"><i style="background:var(--carbs)"></i>'+e.carbs+'g</span></div>'+
          '<div class="meal__kc">'+e.kcal+'<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-500);font-weight:600"> kcal</span></div>'+
          '<button class="meal__del" data-ts="'+e.ts+'" title="Delete"><i class="ph-duotone ph-trash"></i></button></div>';
      }).join("");
    }
    charts(h);
  }

  $("log").addEventListener("click",function(ev){
    var b=ev.target.closest(".meal__del"); if(!b) return;
    var ts=+b.getAttribute("data-ts"); save(load().filter(function(e){return e.ts!==ts;})); render();
  });

  function charts(h){
    if(typeof Chart==="undefined") return;
    var days=[],sums=[],any=false;
    for(var i=6;i>=0;i--){ var d=new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate()-i); var k=dkey(d);
      days.push(d.toLocaleDateString(undefined,{weekday:"short"}));
      var s=h.filter(function(e){return dkey(e.ts)===k;}).reduce(function(a,e){return a+(+e.kcal||0);},0);
      sums.push(s); if(s>0) any=true; }
    $("calWrap").classList.toggle("off",!any); $("calEmpty").classList.toggle("on",!any);
    if(any){
      if(!calChart){ calChart=new Chart($("chCal"),{type:"bar",data:{labels:days,datasets:[{data:sums,backgroundColor:"#ff6a3d",hoverBackgroundColor:"#ec5526",borderRadius:8,maxBarThickness:30}]},
        options:{maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{backgroundColor:"#10151f",padding:10,cornerRadius:8,callbacks:{label:function(c){return c.parsed.y+" kcal";}}}},
          scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true,border:{display:false},grid:{color:"#f1f3f8"},ticks:{color:"#9aa1af",font:{size:11}}},x:{border:{display:false},grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:"#9aa1af",font:{size:11}}}}}}); }
      else{ calChart.data.labels=days; calChart.data.datasets[0].data=sums; calChart.update(); }
    }
    var cnt={}; h.forEach(function(e){cnt[e.food]=(cnt[e.food]||0)+1;});
    var top=Object.keys(cnt).sort(function(a,b){return cnt[b]-cnt[a];}).slice(0,5);
    $("foodWrap").classList.toggle("off",!top.length); $("foodEmpty").classList.toggle("on",!top.length);
    if(top.length){
      var pal=["#ff6a3d","#7c5cff","#16b87a","#f59e0b","#0ea5e9"];
      var ld=top.map(function(f){return f.replace(/_/g," ");}), dd=top.map(function(f){return cnt[f];});
      if(!foodChart){ foodChart=new Chart($("chFood"),{type:"doughnut",data:{labels:ld,datasets:[{data:dd,backgroundColor:pal,borderWidth:2,borderColor:"#fff"}]},
        options:{maintainAspectRatio:false,cutout:"66%",plugins:{legend:{position:"right",labels:{boxWidth:9,boxHeight:9,font:{size:11},color:"#39414f",padding:10,usePointStyle:true}},
          tooltip:{backgroundColor:"#10151f",padding:10,cornerRadius:8,callbacks:{label:function(c){var tot=c.dataset.data.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0);return c.label+": "+c.parsed+" ("+Math.round(c.parsed/tot*100)+"%)";}}}}}}); }
      else{ foodChart.data.labels=ld; foodChart.data.datasets[0].data=dd; foodChart.data.datasets[0].backgroundColor=pal; foodChart.update(); }
    }
  }

  $("bClear").onclick=function(){ if(confirm("Clear all meal history?")){ localStorage.removeItem(KEY); render(); } };

  /* ---------------- profile & goals modal ---------------- */
  function readForm(){ return {height:+$("inH").value||170, weight:+$("inW").value||70, age:+$("inA").value||30,
    sex:$("inS").value, activity:+$("inAct").value, goal:$("inGoal").value}; }
  function previewBmi(){ var bi=bmiInfo(readForm()); $("bmiV").textContent=bi.bmi;
    var c=$("bmiCat"); c.textContent=bi.cat; c.style.color=bi.col; c.style.background=bi.col+"22"; }
  function openProfile(){ var p=loadProfile();
    $("inH").value=p.height; $("inW").value=p.weight; $("inA").value=p.age;
    $("inS").value=p.sex; $("inAct").value=p.activity; $("inGoal").value=p.goal;
    previewBmi(); $("modal").classList.add("on"); }
  function closeProfile(){ $("modal").classList.remove("on"); }
  ["inH","inW","inA","inS"].forEach(function(id){ $(id).addEventListener("input",previewBmi); });
  $("profileBtn").onclick=openProfile;
  $("mCancel").onclick=closeProfile;
  $("modal").addEventListener("click",function(e){ if(e.target===$("modal")) closeProfile(); });
  $("mSave").onclick=function(){ var p=readForm(); saveProfile(p); GOAL=computeGoals(p); render(); closeProfile(); toast("Goals personalized for your profile"); };

  /* ---------------- model ---------------- */
  function loadModel(){
    if(typeof tf==="undefined"){ alertMsg("AI engine failed to load. Disable ad-blockers & refresh.","err"); toast("TensorFlow.js failed to load",true); return; }
    alertMsg("Loading AI model (~10 MB, one time)…");
    var nc={requestInit:{cache:"no-store"}};
    Promise.all([
      tf.loadLayersModel(MODEL,nc),
      fetch("/food-model/labels.json",{cache:"no-store"}).then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error("labels "+r.status);return r.json();}),
      fetch("/food-model/calories.json",{cache:"no-store"}).then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error("calories "+r.status);return r.json();})
    ]).then(function(res){
      model=res[0]; labels=res[1]; cals=res[2];
      var w=tf.zeros([1,IMG,IMG,3]); model.predict(w).dataSync(); w.dispose();
      alertMsg("Model ready — scan a meal to begin.","ok");
    }).catch(function(e){ alertMsg("Could not load model: "+e.message,"err"); toast("Model load failed: "+e.message,true); });
  }

  /* ---------------- camera / upload ---------------- */
  $("bCam").onclick=function(){
    navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({video:{facingMode:"environment"}}).then(function(s){
      var v=$("vid"); v.srcObject=s; v.style.display="block"; $("cv").style.display="none"; $("ph").style.display="none";
      $("bScan").disabled=!model; alertMsg(model?"Camera on — point at food and tap Scan.":"Camera on — waiting for model…");
    }).catch(function(e){ toast("Camera blocked — use Upload instead",true); alertMsg("Camera blocked: "+e.message,"err"); });
  };
  $("bScan").onclick=function(){ var v=$("vid"); if(!v.videoWidth){ toast("Camera not ready yet",true); return; }
    var c=$("cv"); c.width=v.videoWidth; c.height=v.videoHeight; c.getContext("2d").drawImage(v,0,0); classify(c); };
  $("bUp").onclick=function(){ $("file").click(); };
  $("file").onchange=function(ev){
    var f=ev.target.files[0]; if(!f) return;
    if(!/^image\//.test(f.type)){ toast("That file isn't an image (use JPG/PNG)",true); ev.target.value=""; return; }
    overlay(true,"Loading image…"); alertMsg("Loading image…");
    var url=URL.createObjectURL(f), img=new Image();
    img.onload=function(){ var c=$("cv"); c.width=img.naturalWidth; c.height=img.naturalHeight; c.getContext("2d").drawImage(img,0,0);
      c.style.display="block"; $("vid").style.display="none"; $("ph").style.display="none"; URL.revokeObjectURL(url); classify(c); };
    img.onerror=function(){ URL.revokeObjectURL(url); overlay(false); toast("Could not read that image — try another",true); alertMsg("Couldn't read image.","err"); };
    img.src=url; ev.target.value="";
  };

  /* ---------------- inference ---------------- */
  function classify(canvas){
    if(!model){ overlay(false); alertMsg("Model still loading — please wait, then scan again."); toast("Model still loading…",true); return; }
    if(!canvas.width){ overlay(false); toast("No image to scan",true); return; }
    overlay(true,"Analyzing your meal…"); alertMsg("Analyzing…");
    $("bScan").disabled=true; $("bUp").disabled=true; $("bCam").disabled=true;
    setTimeout(function(){
      try{
        var probs=tf.tidy(function(){
          var t=tf.browser.fromPixels(canvas).resizeBilinear([IMG,IMG]).toFloat().expandDims(0).div(127.5).sub(1);
          return model.predict(t).dataSync();
        });
        if(!probs||!probs.length) throw new Error("empty prediction");
        show(probs);
      }catch(err){ toast("Detection failed: "+err.message,true); alertMsg("Detection failed: "+err.message,"err"); }
      finally{ overlay(false); $("bScan").disabled=!($("vid").srcObject); $("bUp").disabled=false; $("bCam").disabled=false; }
    },40);
  }

  function show(probs){
    var idx=Array.from(probs.keys()).sort(function(a,b){return probs[b]-probs[a];});
    var top=idx.slice(0,4).map(function(i){return {name:labels[i]||("class "+i),p:probs[i]};});
    var best=top[0], c=cals[best.name]||{kcal:0,serving:"n/a",protein:0,fat:0,carbs:0};
    $("resEmpty").style.display="none"; $("resBox").style.display="block";
    $("rFood").textContent=best.name.replace(/_/g," ");
    $("rServ").textContent="per "+c.serving; $("rKcalV").textContent=c.kcal;
    $("mPro").textContent=c.protein+"g"; $("mFat").textContent=c.fat+"g"; $("mCarb").textContent=c.carbs+"g";
    var pct=Math.round(best.p*100), lvl=pct>=60?"high":pct>=35?"med":"low";
    var label={high:"High confidence",med:"Medium confidence",low:"Low confidence"}[lvl];
    var ic={high:"check-circle",med:"warning-circle",low:"warning"}[lvl];
    var b=$("rBadge"); b.className="badge badge--"+lvl;
    b.innerHTML='<i class="ph-duotone ph-'+ic+'"></i>'+pct+"% · "+label;
    $("alts").innerHTML=top.slice(1).map(function(t,i){var k=(cals[t.name]||{}).kcal;
      return '<div class="alt"><span class="alt__rank">'+(i+2)+'</span><span class="alt__nm">'+t.name.replace(/_/g," ")+'</span><span class="alt__r"><div class="alt__pct">'+Math.round(t.p*100)+'%</div><div class="alt__kc">'+(k!=null?k+" kcal":"—")+'</div></span></div>';}).join("");

    var h=load(); h.push({food:best.name,label:best.name.replace(/_/g," "),kcal:+c.kcal||0,protein:+c.protein||0,fat:+c.fat||0,carbs:+c.carbs||0,conf:best.p,ts:Date.now()}); save(h); render();
    alertMsg(best.name.replace(/_/g," ")+" logged to your meal log.","ok");
    if(typeof scope!=="undefined"&&scope.send){ scope.send({payload:{food:best.name,kcal:c.kcal,serving:c.serving,protein:c.protein,fat:c.fat,carbs:c.carbs,confidence:best.p,ts:Date.now()}}); }
  }

  render();
  loadModel();
})();
</script>
